title: LintRule
description: A single lint rule entry in a lint_rules_<version>.json file (per ADR-0002 §4).

rule_id.description: Unique rule identifier within its kind. Examples: 'W8101' (pylint-odoo), 'no-var' (ESLint), 'BLE001' (ruff).

kind.description: Lint tool kind. 'pylint-odoo' for OCA/pylint-odoo checkers, 'eslint'/'eslint-odoo' for JS, 'ruff-builtin' for ruff rule categories.

message.description: Human-readable description of what this rule checks. Shown in tool output.

severity.description: Severity level: 'error' = must fix, 'warning' = should fix, 'info' = advisory.

file_pattern.description: Glob pattern for files this rule applies to. Null means all files.

fix_template.description: Optional code snippet or prose describing how to fix the violation. Shown in tool fix_template field.

core_symbol_qname.description: Qualified name of the CoreSymbol this rule is associated with (e.g. 'odoo.models.BaseModel.name_get'). Used to MERGE USES_CORE_SYMBOL edge in Neo4j. Null when rule is not tied to a specific API symbol.
